title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information at a meeting of a theatre group.
audio_script: Man: Good evening, and thank you for coming to the first meeting of the community theatre group. I’ll give you a few details before we begin. Our director this year is Emma [14]Hill[/14]. Some of you may know her because she has worked with the youth theatre for several years. Rehearsals will usually be on [15]Wednesday[/15] evenings, although we may need one or two Sunday afternoons before the final show. Please bring any old [16]photographs[/16] of the town if you have them, because the play is about local life fifty years ago. Costumes will be simple, but everyone in the first scene should wear something [17]blue[/17]. We’ll explain why when you read the script. Next week we won’t meet here. Instead, the rehearsal will be in the village [18]hall[/18], where there is a larger stage. The membership fee is [19]four[/19] pounds a month. That money helps pay for lights, paper and tea during breaks. If you’re new, don’t worry about acting experience. The most important thing is that you enjoy working with other people. We hope to perform the play in April, so there is plenty of time to learn your parts. Not everyone will need to speak on stage; we also need people to help with sound, lights and tickets. If you are nervous, you can start with a small job and decide later whether you want to act. Please write your phone number clearly on the form before you leave tonight.  We will choose the main parts after two weeks, when everyone has had a chance to read the script aloud.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the director this year is Emma Hill.
The speaker says rehearsals will usually be on Wednesday evenings.
The speaker asks members to bring old photographs of the town.
The speaker says everyone in the first scene should wear something blue.
The speaker says next week the rehearsal will be in the village hall.
The speaker says the membership fee is four pounds a month.
